title: Used To & Would
topics: used to · would · be used to · get used to
description: Minulé zvyky a stavy — used to, would, be/get used to.

vocabulary.cz: Past habit or state that no longer exists
For BOTH habits AND states in the past

notes: would live   ✗ cannot use would for states

examples.en: I used to play football every weekend.
examples.cz: Každý víkend jsem hrával fotbal. (už ne)

examples.en: She used to live in Paris.
Did you use to have long hair?
When I was young, we would spend summers at the lake.
examples.cz: Když jsem byl/a malý/á, trávili jsme léta u jezera.

examples.en: Every Sunday she would bake bread.
He would always forget his keys.
Are you used to driving on the left?
She got used to living alone quickly.
examples.cz: Rychle si zvykla na život sama.

quiz.sentence: When I was a child, I ___ climb trees every day. (habit)
Every summer we ___ visit our grandparents. (repeated past action)
Is he ___ driving on the left yet? (accustomed)

tasks: 1. Write 5 sentences about what you used to do as a child
2. Describe a typical childhood summer using 'would'
3. Write about something you had to get used to (new job, city, habit)
